recommendations.title: French Connection II
recommendations.overview: "Popeye" Doyle travels to Marseilles to find Alain Charnier, the drug smuggler that eluded him in New York.

recommendations.title: Reindeer Games
recommendations.overview: After assuming his dead cellmate's identity to get with his girlfriend, an ex-con finds himself the reluctant participant in a casino heist.

recommendations.title: Seven Days in May
recommendations.overview: A U.S. Marine Corps colonel alerts the president of a planned military coup against him.

recommendations.title: Seconds
recommendations.overview: An unhappy middle-aged banker agrees to a procedure that will fake his death and give him a completely new look and identity; one that comes with its own price.

recommendations.title: Black Sunday
recommendations.overview: An Israeli anti-terrorist agent must stop a disgruntled Vietnam vet cooperating in a Black September PLO plot to commit a terrorist attack at the Super Bowl.

recommendations.title: 52 Pick-Up
recommendations.overview: Harry Mitchell is a successful Los Angeles manufacturer whose wife is running for city council. His life is turned upside down when three blackmailers confront him with a videotape of him with his young mistress and demand $100,000. Fearing that the

recommendations.title: The Manchurian Candidate
recommendations.overview: Near the end of the Korean War, a platoon of U.S. soldiers is captured by communists and brainwashed. Following the war, the platoon is returned home, and Sergeant Raymond Shaw is lauded as a hero by the rest of his platoon. However, the platoon comm

recommendations.title: The Island of Dr. Moreau
recommendations.overview: A plane crash surviving attorney stumbles upon a mysterious island and is shocked to discover that a brilliant scientist and his lab assistant have found a way to combine human and animal DNA—with horrific results.

recommendations.title: Grand Prix
